queries.question: What tourists visited tourist attractions at Portobello and what tourists visited local markets in the same location?
queries.sql:
SELECT Tourists.Name 
FROM Tourists
WHERE (Tourists.Activity = "Tourist Attraction" OR Tourists.Activity = "Local Market") AND Tourists.Location = "Portobello"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?tourists a :Tourists .
  ?tourists p:name ?name .
  ?tourists p:Activity ?activity_w .
  ?tourists p:Activity ?activity_w2 .
  ?tourists p:location ?location_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?activity_w) = "Tourist Attraction" || STR(?activity_w2) = "Local Market")) && STR(?location_w) = "Portobello"))
}

queries.question: List all tourists that visited tourist attractions and also list tourists that visited local markets in Portobello.
queries.sql:
SELECT Tourists.Name 
FROM Tourists
WHERE Tourists.Activity = "Tourist Attraction" OR Tourists.Activity = "Local Market" AND Tourists.Location = "Portobello"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?tourists a :Tourists .
  ?tourists p:name ?name .
  ?tourists p:Activity ?activity_w .
  ?tourists p:Activity ?activity_w2 .
  ?tourists p:location ?location_w .
  FILTER((STR(?activity_w) = "Tourist Attraction" || (STR(?activity_w2) = "Local Market" && STR(?location_w) = "Portobello")))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Provide me with the tourists that visited tourist attractions and local markets in Portobello.
